gi_status.summary:
SELECT GNSTSCDE STSCODE, FLFLTCDE FLOW_TYPE, COUNT(DISTINCT INHLDCDE)CARTONS
FROM (
SELECT * FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCA WHERE PLPKLNBR IN
(SELECT PLPKLNBR FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPLH WHERE PLPKLNBR IN (SELECT PLPKLNBR
FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCA WHERE SHTRLNBR IN (SELECT SHTRLNBR FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRTRL WHERE
SHCOFDTE = REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE, ISO) ,'-','')
)) AND SHGISFLG ='N' )
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCA WHERE INHLDCDE IN (SELECT
INHLDCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCI WHERE PPPRODTE =
REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE, ISO) ,'-','')
) AND PLPKLNBR IN
(SELECT PLPKLNBR FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPLH WHERE SHPAHFLG ='N')
) A GROUP BY GNSTSCDE, FLFLTCDE
ORDER BY GNSTSCDE, FLFLTCDE
gi_status.gi_status:
SELECT SHGISFLG , count(*)QTY
FROM ctxprwdta.shrplh
WHERE PLPKLNBR in (
SELECT PLPKLNBR
FROM ctxprwdta.shrpca
WHERE SHTRLNBR in (
SELECT SHTRLNBR
FROM ctxprwdta.shrtrl
WHERE SHCOFDTE = REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE, ISO) ,'-','')
)
)
GROUP BY SHGISFLG
gi_status.errors:

FROM CTXPRWDTA.GNSERR WHERE GNERRLNK ='GIPROCESS'

(SELECT SHTRLNBR FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRTRL WHERE SHCOFDTE = REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT

label_history.print_record:
SELECT DISTINCT char(substring(a.SPRODKEY,13,20),20) CTRN_ID,
A.SPPRTOUQ, B.SPIPACDE, A.GNCRTUSR, A.SPPRCDTE, A.SPPRCTME
FROM CTXPRWDTA.sprrod a LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.sprprd b ON b.SPPRDCDE =a.SPPRTOUQ
WHERE substr(a.SPRODKEY,13,20) = 'CARTON_PLAN'
ORDER BY CTRN_ID
label_history.check_open_work:
SELECT DISTINCT
A.INHLDCDE,
B.GNSTSCDE AS FLRWOR ,
'0'||BIGINT(C.GNSTSCDE) AS RERRTH,
D.GNOPHSTS AS GNROPH ,
E.IBWIDSTS AS IBRWID ,
F.IBWIHSTS AS IBRWIH ,
G.GNSTSCDE AS GNRCHN ,
H.GNSTSCDE AS STRRSI ,
I.STHLDCDE AS STRHUS1 ,
P.STHLDCDE AS STRHUS2 ,
J.STSSDSTS AS STRSSD ,
K.STSSHSTS AS STRSTH ,
L.GNSTSCDE AS PPRSFC ,
M.LOLOCSGT AS PPRPIN ,
N.BPINSSTS AS BPRINS ,
Q.INSTSCDE AS INRHDR
FROM
CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD A
left join CTXPRWDTA.FLRWOR B ON A.INHLDCDE=B.INHLDCDE AND B.GNSTSCDE<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.RERRTH C ON A.INHLDCDE=C.INHLDCDE AND C.GNSTSCDE<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.GNROPH D ON A.INHLDCDE=D.GNHUIPIC AND D.GNOPHSTS<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.IBRWID E ON A.INHLDCDE=E.INHLDCDE AND E.IBWIDSTS ='020'
left join CTXPRWDTA.IBRWIH F ON A.INHLDCDE=F.INHLDCDE AND F.IBWIHSTS<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.GNRCHN G ON A.INHLDCDE=G.INHLDCDE AND G.GNSTSCDE<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.STRRSI H ON A.INHLDCDE=H.INHLDCDE AND H.GNSTSCDE<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.STRHUS I ON A.INHLDCDE=I.STHLDCDE
left join CTXPRWDTA.STRHUS P ON A.INHLDOWN=I.STHLDCDE
left join CTXPRWDTA.STRSSD J ON A.INHLDCDE=J.STCHDCDE AND J.STSSDSTS<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.STRSTH K ON A.INHLDCDE=K.STHLDCDE AND K.STSSHSTS<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.PPRSFC L ON A.INHLDCDE=L.INHLDCDE AND L.GNSTSCDE<>'062'
left join CTXPRWDTA.PPRPIN M ON A.LOLOCSGT=M.LOLOCSGT AND M.GNSTSCDE<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.BPRINS N ON A.INHLDCDE=N.BPHLDCDE AND N.BPINSSTS<>'060'
left join CTXPRWDTA.INRHDR Q ON A.INHLDCDE=Q.INHLDCDE
WHERE A.inhldcde  = 'CARTON_PLAN'
label_history.check_audit_work:
SELECT B.IBRCPNBR, B.ASUCCCDE, A.ACACACDE, A.ACACTCDE, A.IBWIHSTS
FROM CTXPRWDTA.ibrwih a,CTXPRWDTA.ibrrli b WHERE inhldcde=ASUCCCDE and IBRCPNBR = 'CARTON_PLAN'
and A.ACACTCDE in('AUD','UPC') AND IBWIHSTS <>'060'
label_history.check_sku_aminus:
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(MMPRDMAT)
||'-'||TRIM(MMESICDE)SKU FROM CTXPRWDTA.MMRUPC WHERE TRIM(MMPRDMAT)
||'-'||TRIM(MMESICDE) = 'CARTON_PLAN' AND TRIM(MMPRDMAT)
||'-'||TRIM(MMESICDE) NOT IN (
SELECT TRIM(PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(PRCOLCDE)
||'-'||TRIM(INEXTSIZ) FROM CTXPRWDTA.PRRFSC WHERE TRIM(PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(PRCOLCDE)
||'-'||TRIM(INEXTSIZ) = 'CARTON_PLAN' AND MMISGCDE='P00' )
label_history.qa_unlock:
SELECT A.PPPRODTE,C.GNSTSCDE,B.INHLDCDE, B.PRSTYCDE, B.PRCOLCDE, B.INEXTSIZ, B.SHACPQTY
FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCI A,CTXPRWDTA.SHRPLI B,CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCA C
WHERE TRIM(B.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(B.PRCOLCDE)||'-'||TRIM(B.INEXTSIZ) = 'CARTON_PLAN'
AND C.GNSTSCDE NOT IN('160','090')  AND A.INHLDCDE=B.INHLDCDE AND B.INHLDCDE =C.INHLDCDE
GROUP BY A.PPPRODTE,C.GNSTSCDE,B.INHLDCDE, B.PRSTYCDE, B.PRCOLCDE, B.INEXTSIZ, B.SHACPQTY
ORDER BY A.PPPRODTE,C.GNSTSCDE,B.INHLDCDE, B.PRSTYCDE, B.PRCOLCDE, B.INEXTSIZ, B.SHACPQTY
label_history.so_query:
SELECT DISTINCT PLPKLNBR, DNDNHNBR, CUCUSNBR, DNSDCCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.PPRSNH WHERE
PLPKLNBR = 'CARTON_PLAN'
label_history.nfc:
SELECT DISTINCT A.ASSPONBR , A.ASISQNBR, A.MMPRDMAT, A.ASSHPNBR, B.ASUCCCDE,
SUM(B.ASUSCQTY)QTY FROM ctxprwdta.ASRSHD A,ctxprwdta.ASRSHC B WHERE A.ASSHPNBR= B.ASSHPNBR AND
A.ASDLVNBR= B.ASDLVNBR AND A.ASSHPNBR = 'CARTON_PLAN'  GROUP BY A.ASSPONBR , A.ASISQNBR, A.MMPRDMAT, A.ASSHPNBR, B.ASUCCCDE
ORDER BY A.ASSPONBR , A.ASISQNBR, A.MMPRDMAT, A.ASSHPNBR, B.ASUCCCDE
label_history.pack_info:
SELECT DISTINCT A.INHLDCDE, A.PAUSRCDE, B.PRSTYCDE, B.PRCOLCDE, B.INEXTSIZ,
B.SHACPQTY, A.GNUPDDTE, A.GNJOBTME, A.GNJOBNME FROM CTXPRWDTA.PARSHH A,CTXPRWDTA.PARSHI
B WHERE A.PASHHSGT= B.PASHHSGT AND A.INHLDCDE = 'CARTON_PLAN'
label_history.rso:
SELECT  * FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT A.RNRSOCDE, B.PRSTYCDE, B.PRCOLCDE, B.INEXTSIZ, B.COPQUCDE,
B.MMISGCDE, B.INONHQTY ,B.INHLDCDE,'' DENIAL_CODE   FROM CTXPRWDTA.RNRRHH A,CTXPRWDTA.INRDTL B WHERE
A.RNHLDCDE =B.INHLDCDE
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT A.RNRSOCDE,
B.PRSTYCDE, B.PRCOLCDE, B.INEXTSIZ, B.COPQUCDE, B.MMISGCDE,
B.INONHQTY ,B.INHLDCDE,A.RNDENCDE DENIAL_CODE  FROM CTXPRWDTA.RNRDHH A,CTXPRWDTA.INRDTL B WHERE
A.RNHLDCDE
=B.INHLDCDE) WHERE RNRSOCDE = 'CARTON_PLAN'
label_history.history_location:
SELECT DISTINCT C.GRGRPCDE, C.LOSYSLOC, A.PRSTYCDE, A.PRCOLCDE, A.INEXTSIZ
FROM CTXPRWDTA.INRDTA A,CTXPRWDTA.INRHLA B,CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO C
WHERE A.INHLDCDE = B.INHLDCDE AND
trim(A.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||trim(A.PRCOLCDE)||'-'||trim(A.INEXTSIZ) = 'CARTON_PLAN'
AND A.INHLDCDE LIKE '00000000003%'
AND B.LOLOCSGT= C.LOLOCSGT
AND (C.LOSYSLOC LIKE '35%' OR C.LOSYSLOC LIKE '38%' OR C.LOSYSLOC LIKE '39%')
GROUP BY C.GRGRPCDE, C.LOSYSLOC, A.PRSTYCDE, A.PRCOLCDE, A.INEXTSIZ
ORDER BY A.PRSTYCDE, A.PRCOLCDE, A.INEXTSIZ
label_history.dp_area_info:
SELECT DISTINCT A.INHLDCDE, C.LOSYSLOC, A.PRSTYCDE, A.PRCOLCDE, A.INEXTSIZ,
A.INONHQTY FROM ctxprwdta.inrdtl a,ctxprwdta.inrhld b ,ctxprwdta.lorloc c WHERE a.inhldcde
=b.inhldcde and b.lolocsgt =c.lolocsgt and a.inhldcde like
'00000000003%' and
trim(a.prstycde)||'-'||trim(a.prcolcde)||'-'||trim(a.inextsiz) = 'CARTON_PLAN'
label_history.default_location:
SELECT C.PRSTYCDE,C.PRCOLCDE,C.INEXTSIZ,E.LOSYSLOC ,
SUM(C.INONHQTY)QTY
FROM CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC E
LEFT  JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD A ON A.LOLOCSGT = E.LOLOCSGT
LEFT  JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRDTL C ON A.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDCDE
INNER JOIN CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO ALO ON E.LOLOCSGT = ALO.LOLOCSGT
AND ALO.ACACTCDE ='OPPICK'
WHERE E.LOSYSZNE =SUBSTR('CARTON_PLAN',1,2)
AND E.LOSYSROW BETWEEN SUBSTR('CARTON_PLAN',3,2) AND SUBSTR('CARTON_PLAN',5,2)
GROUP BY C.PRSTYCDE,C.PRCOLCDE,C.INEXTSIZ,E.LOSYSLOC
ORDER BY E.LOSYSLOC
label_history.export_inventory_q1:
SELECT B.CODIVCDE, COUNT(DISTINCT TRIM(A.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||
                        TRIM(A.PRCOLCDE)||'-'||TRIM(A.INEXTSIZ)||TRIM( A.COPQUCDE)||TRIM(A.MMISGCDE)) 
                        AS SKU,SUM(A.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN B.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN B.MMDLUQTY WHEN B.LLPRPFLG 
                        <> 2 THEN 1 END) PU , SUM(A.INONHQTY) DU FROM {CARTON_PLAN} A,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD B 
                        WHERE TRIM(A.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(A.PRCOLCDE) = B.MMPRDMAT GROUP BY B.CODIVCDE ORDER BY  B.CODIVCDE
label_history.export_inventory_q2:
SELECT A.COPQUCDE||A.MMISGCDE AS ISEG,COUNT(DISTINCT 
                        TRIM(A.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(A.PRCOLCDE)||'-' ||TRIM(A.INEXTSIZ)) AS SKU,
                        SUM(A.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN B.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN B.MMDLUQTY WHEN B.LLPRPFLG 
                        <> 2 THEN 1 END) AS PU , SUM(A.INONHQTY) AS DU FROM {CARTON_PLAN} A
                        ,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD B WHERE TRIM(A.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(A.PRCOLCDE) = B.MMPRDMAT 
                        GROUP BY A.COPQUCDE||A.MMISGCDE ORDER BY A.COPQUCDE||A.MMISGCDE
label_history.export_inventory_q3:
SELECT LOBLDCDE,SUM(PU) AS PU,SUM(DU) AS DU,SUM(SKU) AS SKU,SUM(CRTNS) 
                        AS CRTNS FROM ( SELECT(CASE WHEN A.CODIVCDE =20 THEN 'FW01' ELSE 'AP01' END) 
                        LOBLDCDE,SKU,PU,DU,CRTNS FROM ( SELECT C.CODIVCDE, COUNT(DISTINCT TRIM(PRSTYCDE)||
                        '-'||TRIM(PRCOLCDE)||'-'||TRIM(INEXTSIZ)||TRIM( A.COPQUCDE)||TRIM(A.MMISGCDE))SKU, 
                        SUM( A.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN C.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN C.MMDLUQTY WHEN C.LLPRPFLG <> 2 THEN 1 END) 
                        AS PU, SUM(A.INONHQTY) AS DU,COUNT(DISTINCT A.INHLDCDE)CRTNS FROM {CARTON_PLAN} A,
                        CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD C WHERE TRIM(A.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(A.PRCOLCDE) =C.MMPRDMAT 
                        GROUP BY C.CODIVCDE ORDER BY C.CODIVCDE, SKU)A)B GROUP BY LOBLDCDE
label_history.export_inventory_q4:
SELECT TYPE,SUM(PU)PU,SUM(DU)DU,COUNT(DISTINCT INHLDCDE)CTNS 
                        FROM( SELECT TYPE,PRSTYCDE,PRCOLCDE,INEXTSIZ,PU,DU,INHLDCDE FROM ( (SELECT DISTINCT 'AP_HB'TYPE,
                        C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE,C.INEXTSIZ,SUM(C.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN E.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN E.MMDLUQTY WHEN 
                        E.LLPRPFLG <> 2 THEN 1 END) AS PU , SUM(C.INONHQTY) AS DU, C.INHLDCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO A,
                        CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B, {CARTON_PLAN} C,CTXPRWDTA.INRHDR D,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD E WHERE A.LOLOCSGT =B.LOLOCSGT 
                        AND B.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDCDE AND B.INHLDCDE = D.INHLDCDE AND TRIM(C.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(C.PRCOLCDE)=
                        E.MMPRDMAT AND A.ACACTCDE ='MCARST' AND A.GRGRPCDE IN(SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRGRP WHERE 
                        GRGRPPAR IN( SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN('HBCARA')))GROUP BY C.PRSTYCDE, 
                        C.PRCOLCDE,C.INEXTSIZ,C.INHLDCDE) UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT 'FW_HB'TYPE,C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE,C.INEXTSIZ,
                        SUM(C.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN E.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN E.MMDLUQTY WHEN E.LLPRPFLG <> 2 THEN 1 END) AS PU , 
                        SUM(C.INONHQTY) AS DU,C.INHLDCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO A,CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B, {CARTON_PLAN} C,
                        CTXPRWDTA.INRHDR D,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD E WHERE A.LOLOCSGT =B.LOLOCSGT AND B.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDCDE 
                        AND B.INHLDCDE = D.INHLDCDE AND TRIM(C.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(C.PRCOLCDE)=E.MMPRDMAT AND A.ACACTCDE ='MCARST' 
                        AND A.GRGRPCDE IN(SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN( SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM 
                        CTXPRWDTA.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN('HBCARF')))GROUP BY C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE,C.INEXTSIZ,C.INHLDCDE) 
                        UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT 'FW_HB'TYPE,C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE, C.INEXTSIZ,SUM(C.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN 
                        F.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN F.MMDLUQTY WHEN F.LLPRPFLG <> 2 THEN 1 END) AS PU,SUM(C.INONHQTY) AS DU,C.INHLDCDE 
                        FROM CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD A,CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B,{CARTON_PLAN} C,CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO D,CTXPRWDTA.INRHDR E,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD 
                        F WHERE A.INHLDCDE =B.INHLDOWN AND A.LOLOCSGT = D.LOLOCSGT AND B.INHLDCDE =C.INHLDCDE AND B.INHLDCDE = E.INHLDCDE 
                        AND TRIM(C.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(C.PRCOLCDE)=F.MMPRDMAT AND D.ACACTCDE ='MPALST' AND D.GRGRPCDE IN(SELECT GRGRPCDE 
                        FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN( SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN('HBPALF'))) 
                        GROUP BY C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE, C.INEXTSIZ,C.INHLDCDE) UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT 'AP_HB'TYPE,C.PRSTYCDE, 
                        C.PRCOLCDE, C.INEXTSIZ,SUM(C.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN F.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN F.MMDLUQTY WHEN F.LLPRPFLG <> 2 THEN 1 END) 
                        AS PU,SUM(C.INONHQTY) AS DU,C.INHLDCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD A,CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B,{CARTON_PLAN} C,CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO D,
                        CTXPRWDTA.INRHDR E,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD F WHERE A.INHLDCDE =B.INHLDOWN AND A.LOLOCSGT = D.LOLOCSGT AND B.INHLDCDE =C.INHLDCDE 
                        AND B.INHLDCDE = E.INHLDCDE AND TRIM(C.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(C.PRCOLCDE)=F.MMPRDMAT AND D.ACACTCDE ='MPALST' AND D.GRGRPCDE 
                        IN(SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN( SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN('HBPALA'))) 
                        GROUP BY C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE, C.INEXTSIZ,C.INHLDCDE) ) A UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT 'AP_LB'TYPE,A.PRSTYCDE, 
                        A.PRCOLCDE, A.INEXTSIZ,SUM(A.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN E.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN E.MMDLUQTY WHEN E.LLPRPFLG <> 2 THEN 1 END) AS PU ,
                        SUM(A.INONHQTY) AS DU,A.INHLDCDE FROM {CARTON_PLAN} A,CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B,CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO C,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD E WHERE A.INHLDCDE
                        =B.INHLDCDE AND B.LOLOCSGT =C.LOLOCSGT AND TRIM(A.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(A.PRCOLCDE)=E.MMPRDMAT AND C.LOLOCSGT IN(SELECT LOLOCSGT 
                        FROM CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC WHERE LOBLDCDE='AP01')AND C.ACACTCDE ='OPPICK' AND A.INHLDCDE LIKE '00000000003%' GROUP BY A.PRSTYCDE, 
                        A.PRCOLCDE, A.INEXTSIZ,A.INHLDCDE UNION SELECT DISTINCT 'FW_LB'TYPE,A.PRSTYCDE, A.PRCOLCDE,A.INEXTSIZ,SUM(A.INONHQTY / CASE WHEN
                        E.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN E.MMDLUQTY WHEN E.LLPRPFLG <> 2 THEN 1 END) AS PU , SUM(A.INONHQTY) AS DU,A.INHLDCDE FROM {CARTON_PLAN} A,
                        CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B,CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO C,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD E WHERE A.INHLDCDE =B.INHLDCDE AND B.LOLOCSGT =C.LOLOCSGT AND TRIM(A.PRSTYCDE)
                        ||'-'||TRIM(A.PRCOLCDE)=E.MMPRDMAT AND C.LOLOCSGT IN(SELECT LOLOCSGT FROM CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC WHERE LOBLDCDE='FW01')AND C.ACACTCDE ='OPPICK'
                        AND A.INHLDCDE LIKE '00000000003%' GROUP BY A.PRSTYCDE, A.PRCOLCDE, A.INEXTSIZ,A.INHLDCDE) B)C GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY TYPE

export_data.ap_shipping:
SELECT A.PPRUNNBR, B.LOSYSZNE, A.INHTYCDE,count (distinct
a.inhldcde) crtns FROM ctxprwdta.opropn a,ctxprwdta.lorloc b WHERE a.lolocsgt =b.lolocsgt and
a. PPRUNNBR in({placeholders}) and b.losyszne in(30,31,32) and
A.OPPHTCDE ='SHP' GROUP BY A.PPRUNNBR, B.LOSYSZNE, A.INHTYCDE ORDER
BY A.PPRUNNBR, B.LOSYSZNE, A.INHTYCDE
export_data.fw_shipping:
SELECT b.PPRUNNBR,a.INHTYCDE ,count(distinct a.INHLDCDE) CRTNS FROM
ctxprwdta.Shrpca a, ctxprwdta.Shrpci b WHERE a.INHLDCDE=b.INHLDCDE
and a.INHTYCDE in
('13-X20','15-B16','16-B18','17-C10','11-X16','12-X18','14-B14',
'18-Z14','19-X14') and b.PPRUNNBR in({placeholders}) and a.GNSTSCDE<>'090' GROUP BY
b.PPRUNNBR,a.INHTYCDE ORDER BY 1,2
export_data.replenishment:
SELECT a.PLRUNNBR,A.PPPRODTE, B.INHTYCDE,COUNT(DISTINCT A.INHLDCDE)CRTNS FROM
ctxprwdta.rerrth A,ctxprwdta.INRHLA B,ctxprwdta.LORLOC C WHERE a.inhldcde =b.INHLDCDE and
a.lolocsgt = c.lolocsgt AND B.INACTCDE ='DELETE'AND B.INHTFCDE ='CRTN' and a.PLRUNNBR in({placeholders}) GROUP BY
a.PLRUNNBR,a.PPPRODTE,A.GRGRPCDE, B.INHTYCDE ORDER BY a.PLRUNNBR,a.PPPRODTE,A.GRGRPCDE, B.INHTYCDE
export_data.shipment_info:
SELECT DISTINCT A.ASSHPNBR, A.ASSPONBR, A.ASISQNBR, A.MMPRDMAT,
B.MMESICDE, A.MMSTCCDE, B.ASUCCCDE, B.ASCRTCDE,
SUM(B.ASUSCQTY) AS QTY
FROM ctxprwdta.asrshd a, ctxprwdta.asrshc b
WHERE A.ASSHPNBR = B.ASSHPNBR AND A.ASDLVNBR = B.ASDLVNBR AND
A.ASSHPNBR IN ({placeholders})
GROUP BY A.ASSHPNBR, A.ASSPONBR, A.ASISQNBR, A.MMPRDMAT,
B.MMESICDE, A.MMSTCCDE, B.ASUCCCDE, B.ASCRTCDE
ORDER BY A.ASSHPNBR, A.ASSPONBR, A.ASISQNBR, A.MMPRDMAT,
B.MMESICDE, A.MMSTCCDE, B.ASUCCCDE, B.ASCRTCDE
export_data.plan_info_by_por:
SELECT DISTINCT x.PRSTYCDE ,x.PRCOLCDE ,x.INEXTSIZ ,x.COPQUCDE
,x.MMISGCDE,x.asucccde ,b.inhldown, ASIACQTY AS DU ,
ASIACQTY / CASE WHEN z.LLPRPFLG = 2 THEN z.MMDLUQTY WHEN z.LLPRPFLG < 2 THEN 1 END AS pu
,INTYPCDE ,INSTSCDE,d.losysloc ,COALESCE(coalesce(e.grasgcde,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN F.STPNDAOI IS NOT NULL THEN 'PND' ELSE NULL END,
CASE WHEN G.GRGRPCDE IS NOT NULL THEN 'STG' ELSE NULL END)),
coalesce(CASE WHEN H.INHLDCDE IS NOT NULL THEN 'ON TRUCK' ELSE NULL END, 'DOCK DOOR/QA LANE')) AS AREA
,PRPORNBR, IBRCPNBR , z.CODIVCDE
FROM CTXPRWDTA.ibrrli x ,CTXPRWDTA.inrhdr y ,CTXPRWDTA.mmrprd z ,
CTXPRWDTA.inrhld b LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.inrhld c ON
b.inhldown = c.inhldcde LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD H ON C.INHLDOWN =
H.INHLDCDE LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.lorloc d ON coalesce(c.lolocsgt, b.lolocsgt)
= d.lolocsgt LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.grrasl e ON d.LOLOCSGT = e.lolocsgt LEFT
JOIN CTXPRWDTA.STRPND F ON D.LOLOCSGT = F.STPNDLOC LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.GRRALO G ON
D.LOLOCSGT = G.LOLOCSGT AND G.ACACTCDE = 'STG'
WHERE x.asucccde = b.inhldcde AND
(x.PRPORNBR IN ({placeholders}))
AND x.asucccde = y.inhldcde
AND trim(x.prstycde) || '-' || trim(x.prcolcde) = z.mmprdmat order by x.PRSTYCDE ,x.PRCOLCDE ,x.INEXTSIZ ,x.COPQUCDE
,x.MMISGCDE,x.asucccde ,b.inhldown,INTYPCDE ,INSTSCDE,d.losysloc,PRPORNBR, IBRCPNBR , z.CODIVCDE

export_data.packlist_info:

= 2 THEN MMDLUQTY WHEN LLPRPFLG <> 2 THEN 1 END) PU,PPWMSDTE FROM (

export_data.data_by_sku:

C.INHLDOWN, C.INHLDCDE, A.INONHQTY, D.INTYPCDE, D.INSTSCDE,
B.PRPORNBR, B.IBRCPPLN, E.LOSYSLOC, C.INHTFCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.INRDTL A LEFT

date_query.sorter_vna:
SELECT B.GNUPDDTE,B.ACACTCDE,trim(A.INHTYCDE)Carton_type ,COUNT(DISTINCT a.inhldcde) Cartons
FROM CTXPRWDTA.inrhla a,CTXPRWDTA.pprsfc b
WHERE a.inhldcde=b.inhldcde
AND B.ACACTCDE in('PS DBX','FS DBX')
AND b.GNUPDDTE BETWEEN ? AND ?
AND b.GNSTSCDE ='062'
GROUP BY B.GNUPDDTE,B.ACACTCDE,A.INHTYCDE
ORDER BY B.GNUPDDTE,B.ACACTCDE,A.INHTYCDE
date_query.final_sorter:
SELECT A.GNUPDDTE, B.INHTYCDE, COUNT(DISTINCT B.INHLDCDE )cartons FROM

AND A.GNUPDDTE BETWEEN ? AND ?

ORDER BY A.GNUPDDTE, B.INHTYCDE
date_query.dp_promo_nsrt_replenish:

A.LOLOCSGT = C.LOLOCSGT AND A.PPPRODTE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND C.LOBLDCDE
='AP01' AND B.INACTCDE ='DELETE'AND B.INHTFCDE ='CRTN' GROUP BY
A.PPPRODTE,A.GRGRPCDE, B.INHTYCDE ORDER BY A.PPPRODTE,A.GRGRPCDE, B.INHTYCDE
date_query.dp_promo_nsrt_shipping:

A.INHLDCDE) QTY FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCA A,CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCI B,CTXPRWDTA.OPROPN C WHERE
A.INHLDCDE=B.INHLDCDE AND B.INHLDCDE =C.INHLDCDE AND A.FLFLTCDE
='PACK' AND A.GNUPDDTE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND A.GNSTSCDE

date_query.abnormal_tote:
SELECT A.OPPPSSGT, B.INHLDCDE, d.LOSYSLOC ,a.pRSTYCDE, A.PRCOLCDE,

ctxprwdta.OPRPHD A,ctxprwdta.OPRCPH B,ctxprwdta.FLRWOR C,ctxprwdta.LORLOC D WHERE A.OPCPHSGT= B.OPCPHSGT
AND B.INHLDCDE =C.INHLDCDE AND C.LOLOCSGTF =D.LOLOCSGT AND

SELECT PPRUNNBR FROM ctxprwdta.PPRPRU WHERE PPRUNTYP ='AP_FLS' ) ) AND
A.LOSYSLOC LIKE '30%' AND B.INHLDCDE LIKE '00000000004%'AND
C.ACACACDE ='PACKNG' AND D.LOSYSLOC ='3058000000' AND C.GNUPDDTE BETWEEN
? AND ? ORDER BY C.GNUPDDTE, C.GNJOBTME
date_query.shipping_box_types:

WHERE INHTYCDE IN ('13-X20','15-B16','16-B18','17-C10','11-X16'

? AND ? AND OPOPNSTS ='060' GROUP BY GNUPDDTE,
INHTYCDE ORDER BY GNUPDDTE, INHTYCDE
date_query.receiving_efficiency:
SELECT GNUPDDTE,GNJOBUSR,COUNT(DISTINCT ASUCCCDE)CARTONS FROM CTXPRWDTA.IBRRLI WHERE GNUPDDTE
BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ASUCCCDE IN( SELECT INHLDCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.INRHLA)

date_query.production_info:
WITH A
AS (
SELECT DISTINCT A.PPPRODTE
,B.PPRUNTYP
,A.PPRUNNBR
,I.GRGRPPAR
,A.PPWINCDE
,D.CODIVCDE
,A.INHLDCDE
,E.SHCSHDTE
,E.SHCSHTME
,F.FLFLTCDE
,E.SHCTRDTE
,E.SHCTRTME
,H.SHACSNBR
FROM CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCI A
LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.OPROPN I ON A.INHLDCDE = I.INHLDCDE
,CTXPRWDTA.PPRPRU B
,CTXPRWDTA.SHRPLI C
,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD D
,CTXPRWDTA.SHRPLA E
,CTXPRWDTA.SHRPCA F
,CTXPRWDTA.SHRTNW G
LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.SHRTRL H ON G.SHTRLNBR = H.SHTRLNBR
WHERE A.PPPRODTE BETWEEN ?
AND ?
AND A.PPRUNNBR = B.PPRUNNBR
AND A.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDCDE
AND TRIM(C.PRSTYCDE) || '-' || TRIM(C.PRCOLCDE) = D.MMPRDMAT
AND A.INHLDCDE = E.INHLDCDE
AND A.INHLDCDE = F.INHLDCDE
AND F.SHLTRNBR = G.SHLTRNBR
AND F.GNSTSCDE <>'090'
)
SELECT A.*
,CASE
WHEN B.INHLDCDE <> ''
THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N'
END AS VAS_FLAG
FROM A
LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.SHRPLC B ON A.INHLDCDE = B.INHLDCDE
WHERE PPRUNTYP NOT IN (
'AP-DGT'
,'FW-DGT'
,'BBC'
)
UNION ALL
SELECT A.*
,'N' AS VAS_FLAG
FROM A
WHERE PPRUNTYP IN (
'AP-DGT'
,'FW-DGT'
,'BBC'
)

B.INEXTSIZ,B.COPQUCDE, B.MMISGCDE, B.PPUNSQTY,C.LOSYSLOC,A.GNUPDDTE,'RETRIEVAL' TYPE FROM
CTXPRWDTA.STRRSI A,CTXPRWDTA.PPRSFC B,CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC C WHERE A.INHLDCDE= B.INHLDCDE
AND A.STPRELOC = C.LOLOCSGT AND A.STGRPCDE LIKE 'D%' AND A.GNSTSCDE ='060'
UNION ALL
SELECT B.STPHLCDE, B.STCHDCDE ,C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE,
C.INEXTSIZ, C.COPQUCDE, C.MMISGCDE, C.PPUNSQTY,D.LOSYSLOC,A.GNUPDDTE ,'RETRIEVAL' TYPE
FROM CTXPRWDTA.STRRSI A,CTXPRWDTA.STRSSD B,CTXPRWDTA.PPRSFC C,
CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC D WHERE A.INHLDCDE = B.STPHLCDE
AND B.STCHDCDE =C.INHLDCDE AND A.STPRELOC = D.LOLOCSGT
AND A.STGRPCDE LIKE 'D%' AND A.GNSTSCDE='060') A WHERE A.GNUPDDTE BETWEEN ? AND ?
date_query.gr:
SELECT D.LOSYSLOC, B.YMACCNBR, E.GNUPDDTE, E.GNJOBTME ,G.GNUPDDTE ,G.GNJOBTME,
TIMESTAMPDIFF(8,CHAR(TO_DATE(CHAR(G.GNUPDDTE) || ' '||CHAR(DIGITS(G.GNJOBTME)), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') -
TO_DATE(CHAR(E.GNUPDDTE) || ' ' ||CHAR(DIGITS(E.GNJOBTME)),'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ))||' hours' AS GR_Process_Time,
C.IBRCPNBR, C.IBCNTNBR, C.PRPORNBR, F.CODIVCDE,A.INSHPCDE,C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE, C.INEXTSIZ, C.COPQUCDE,C.MMISGCDE, sum(C.ASIACQTY), sum(C.IBIEXQTY)
FROM CTXPRWDTA.IBRRLH A,CTXPRWDTA.YMRASN B,CTXPRWDTA.IBRRLI C,CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC D,CTXPRWDTA.YMRWRK E,CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD F,CTXPRWDTA.IBRRPP G
WHERE A.INSHPCDE=B.YMSHPCDE AND A.IBCNTNBR=B.YMCONNBR AND
A.IBRCPNBR=C.IBRCPNBR AND A.INSHPCDE=C.INSHPCDE AND
A.IBCNTNBR=C.IBCNTNBR AND A.LOLOCSGT=D.LOLOCSGT AND
C.IBRCPNBR=G.IBRCPNBR AND C.IBCNTNBR=G.IBCNTNBR AND
C.INSHPCDE=G.INSHPCDE AND C.PRPORNBR=G.PRPORNBR AND
TRIM(C.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(C.PRCOLCDE)=TRIM(F.MMPRDMAT) AND
B.YMACCNBR=E.YMACCNBR AND E.YMFLONBR=0 AND
G.GNUPDDTE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND G.GNJOBNME='CLOSE_CNTR'
GROUP BY
D.LOSYSLOC, B.YMACCNBR, E.GNUPDDTE, E.GNJOBTME,G.GNUPDDTE,G.GNJOBTME,7 , C.IBRCPNBR, C.IBCNTNBR, C.PRPORNBR, F.CODIVCDE,
A.INSHPCDE,C.PRSTYCDE, C.PRCOLCDE, C.INEXTSIZ, C.COPQUCDE,C.MMISGCDE ORDER BY C.IBRCPNBR, C.IBCNTNBR, C.PRPORNBR
date_query.pre_sku_info:
SELECT DISTINCT GNUPDDTE, SOSTYCDE, SOCOLCDE, SOEXTSIZ FROM ctxprwdta.sorpsn WHERE
gnupddte between ? and ? ORDER BY GNUPDDTE
date_query.fw_conveyor_info:
SELECT REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE,ISO) ,'-','') AS DATE,
B.LOSYSLOC, D.INHLDOWN, D.INHLDCDE, 'OUTBOUND PND' AS AREA
FROM ctxprwdta.STRPND A, ctxprwdta.LORLOC B, ctxprwdta.INRHLD C, ctxprwdta.INRHLD D
WHERE B.LOBLDCDE ='FW01'
AND A.STPNDLOC = B.LOLOCSGT
AND A.STPNDIOO ='O' AND A.STTRTCDE ='MAN'
AND C.LOLOCSGT = A.STPNDLOC
AND C.INHLDCDE = D.INHLDOWN
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE,ISO) ,'-','') AS DATE,
A.LOSYSLOC, C.INHLDOWN, C.INHLDCDE, 'MANUAL FC' AS AREA
FROM ctxprwdta.GRRALO A, ctxprwdta.INRHLD B, ctxprwdta.INRHLD C
WHERE A.GRGRPCDE IN('FFSH35', 'FFSH36')
AND A.LOLOCSGT = B.LOLOCSGT
AND B.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDOWN
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE,ISO) ,'-','') AS DATE,
D.LOSYSLOC, C.INHLDOWN, C.INHLDCDE, 'BELTPICK' AS AREA
FROM ctxprwdta.GRRALO A, ctxprwdta.INRHLD B, ctxprwdta.INRHLD C, ctxprwdta.LORLOC D
WHERE A.GRGRPCDE IN(SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM
ctxprwdta.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN( SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM ctxprwdta.GRRGRP WHERE
GRGRPPAR IN('SHFTW','BPS' )))
AND A.LOLOCSGT = B.LOLOCSGT
AND B.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDOWN
AND A.LOLOCSGT = D.LOLOCSGT
AND D.LOBLDCDE ='FW01'
AND A.LOLOCSGT NOT IN( SELECT LOLOCSGT FROM
ctxprwdta.GRRALO WHERE ACACTCDE = 'SHMINI')
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE,ISO) ,'-','') AS DATE,
D.LOSYSLOC, C.INHLDOWN, C.INHLDCDE, 'MINI STOCK' AS AREA
FROM ctxprwdta.GRRALO A, ctxprwdta.INRHLD B, ctxprwdta.INRHLD C, ctxprwdta.LORLOC D
WHERE A.GRGRPCDE IN(SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM
ctxprwdta.GRRGRP WHERE GRGRPPAR IN( SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM ctxprwdta.GRRGRP WHERE
GRGRPPAR ='SHFTW' ))
AND A.LOLOCSGT = B.LOLOCSGT
AND B.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDOWN
AND A.LOLOCSGT = D.LOLOCSGT
AND A.LOLOCSGT IN( SELECT LOLOCSGT FROM
ctxprwdta.GRRALO WHERE ACACTCDE = 'SHMINI')
date_query.ap_conveyor_info:

AND A.STPNDIOO ='O' AND A.STTRTCDE ='MAN'

AND C.INHLDCDE = D.INHLDOWN
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE,ISO) ,'-','') AS DATE,

FROM ctxprwdta.GRRALO A, ctxprwdta.INRHLD B, ctxprwdta.INRHLD C, ctxprwdta.LORLOC D
WHERE A.GRGRPCDE IN(SELECT GRGRPCDE FROM

AND B.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDOWN

AND D.LOBLDCDE ='AP01'

SELECT DISTINCT REPLACE(CHAR(CURRENT DATE,ISO) ,'-','') AS DATE,

FROM ctxprwdta.GRRALO A, ctxprwdta.INRHLD B, ctxprwdta.INRHLD C, ctxprwdta.LORLOC D

AND B.INHLDCDE = C.INHLDOWN

date_query.hopper_info:
SELECT A.LOSYSLOC, B.INHLDCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC A LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B ON
A.LOLOCSGT =B.LOLOCSGT WHERE LOSYSLOC BETWEEN 4401000000 AND
4455000000
date_query.staging_info:
SELECT A.BPSYSLOC,C.INHLDCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.BPRSHI A LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B ON
A.BPLOCSGT =B.LOLOCSGT LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD C ON B.INHLDCDE =C.INHLDOWN
WHERE A.BPSHISTS<>'060' ORDER BY A.BPSYSLOC,C.INHLDCDE
date_query.fm_inventory:
SELECT D.PRSTYCDE, D.PRCOLCDE, D.INEXTSIZ, F.CODIVCDE, D.COPQUCDE,
D.MMISGCDE, C.INHLDCDE, C.INHLDOWN, D.INONHQTY, G.LOSYSLOC
,E.INSTSCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRASL A LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B ON A.LOLOCSGT
=B.LOLOCSGT LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD C ON B.INHLDCDE =C.INHLDOWN LEFT JOIN
CTXPRWDTA.INRDTL D ON C.INHLDCDE =D.INHLDCDE LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHDR E ON D.INHLDCDE
=E.INHLDCDE LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD F ON
TRIM(D.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(D.PRCOLCDE) =F.MMPRDMAT LEFT JOIN
CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC G ON A.LOLOCSGT =G.LOLOCSGT WHERE A.GRASGCDE ='FWFMQV'
ORDER BY D.PRSTYCDE, D.PRCOLCDE,
D.INEXTSIZ, F.CODIVCDE, D.COPQUCDE, D.MMISGCDE, C.INHLDCDE,
C.INHLDOWN, D.INONHQTY, G.LOSYSLOC ,E.INSTSCDE
date_query.oversize_inventory:
SELECT D.PRSTYCDE, D.PRCOLCDE, D.INEXTSIZ, F.CODIVCDE, D.COPQUCDE,
D.MMISGCDE, C.INHLDCDE, C.INHLDOWN, D.INONHQTY, G.LOSYSLOC
,E.INSTSCDE FROM CTXPRWDTA.GRRASL A LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD B ON A.LOLOCSGT
=B.LOLOCSGT LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHLD C ON B.INHLDCDE =C.INHLDOWN LEFT JOIN
CTXPRWDTA.INRDTL D ON C.INHLDCDE =D.INHLDCDE LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.INRHDR E ON D.INHLDCDE
=E.INHLDCDE LEFT JOIN CTXPRWDTA.MMRPRD F ON
TRIM(D.PRSTYCDE)||'-'||TRIM(D.PRCOLCDE) =F.MMPRDMAT LEFT JOIN
CTXPRWDTA.LORLOC G ON A.LOLOCSGT =G.LOLOCSGT WHERE A.GRASGCDE LIKE 'OVER%'
AND A.GRGRPCDE LIKE 'P%' ORDER BY D.PRSTYCDE, D.PRCOLCDE,
D.INEXTSIZ, F.CODIVCDE, D.COPQUCDE, D.MMISGCDE, C.INHLDCDE,
C.INHLDOWN, D.INONHQTY, G.LOSYSLOC ,E.INSTSCDE
